title: Primordial-Abundance Tests and Lithium Nucleogenesis: Detailed Experimental Programme, Outcomes and Expanded Research Paths
render_method: Microsoft Word native ExportAsFixedFormat; Poppler 180 dpi page rasterisation and visual review
validation: User-edited template edition. All 20 pages visually inspected; Letter geometry, open paragraph rhythm, right-aligned Page N footers and vertically aligned equation equals signs confirmed. One duplicate manual break that created an empty page between Sections 12.1 and 12.2 was removed without changing surrounding content. No clipping, overlap, blank pages, orphaned table headers, split callouts or broken equation groups remain. Accessibility audit found no high-severity issues; 22 medium notices are intentional headerless layout tables used for aligned equation arrays and shaded callouts, and one low notice records a raw-URL hyperlink.
git_policy_note: Citation-facing PDF tracked; user-edited DOCX retained in Codex outputs and adopted as the future technical-paper design authority.
claim_boundary: No lithium-solution claim. The completed standard-background LINX programme finds zero joint D+He+Li passes under the tested clock, baryon-density, neutron-lifetime and selected-rate controls. FR and SU(2) remain model-specific research paths requiring explicit thermal and microphysical derivations; the literature-defined SU(2)-CMB bridge remains separate from the late-time SU2/SU2R fluid.
